<qbsearch-input class="search-input" data-scope="repo:conventional-changelog/commitlint" data-custom-scopes-path="/search/custom_scopes" data-delete-custom-scopes-csrf="jbHR-wdmeLFQ5ZFrs-3mQJ381t66wviF_ycwsr9l-830E8vu5YQZMvd1aqGGnNc__svf9coBW5_py_zXYt21GQ" data-max-custom-scopes="10" data-header-redesign-enabled="false" data-initial-value="" data-blackbird-suggestions-path="/search/suggestions" data-jump-to-suggestions-path="/_graphql/GetSuggestedNavigationDestinations" data-current-repository="conventional-changelog/commitlint" data-current-org="conventional-changelog" data-current-owner="" data-logged-in="false" data-copilot-chat-enabled="false" data-nl-search-enabled="false" data-retain-scroll-position="true">
  <div
    class="search-input-container search-with-dialog position-relative d-flex flex-row flex-items-center tmp-mr-4 rounded"
    data-action="click:qbsearch-input#searchInputContainerClicked"
  >
      <button
        type="button"
        class="header-search-button placeholder  input-button form-control d-flex flex-1 flex-self-stretch flex-items-center no-wrap width-full py-0 pl-2 pr-0 text-left border-0 box-shadow-none"
        data-target="qbsearch-input.inputButton"
        aria-label="Search or jump to…"
        aria-haspopup="dialog"
        placeholder="Search or jump to..."
        data-hotkey=s,/
        autocapitalize="off"
        data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;navbar&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;searchbar&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;global&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;input&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;searchbar_input_global_navbar&quot;}"
        data-action="click:qbsearch-input#handleExpand"
      >
        <div class="mr-2 color-fg-muted">
          <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-search">
    <path d="M10.68 11.74a6 6 0 0 1-7.922-8.982 6 6 0 0 1 8.982 7.922l3.04 3.04a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215ZM11.5 7a4.499 4.499 0 1 0-8.997 0A4.499 4.499 0 0 0 11.5 7Z"></path>
</svg>
        </div>
        <span class="flex-1" data-target="qbsearch-input.inputButtonText">Search or jump to...</span>
          <div class="d-flex" data-target="qbsearch-input.hotkeyIndicator">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="22" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="mr-1"><path fill="none" stroke="#979A9C" opacity=".4" d="M3.5.5h12c1.7 0 3 1.3 3 3v13c0 1.7-1.3 3-3 3h-12c-1.7 0-3-1.3-3-3v-13c0-1.7 1.3-3 3-3z"></path><path fill="#979A9C" d="M11.8 6L8 15.1h-.9L10.8 6h1z"></path></svg>
          </div>
      </button>

    <input type="hidden" name="type" class="js-site-search-type-field">

    
<div class="Overlay--hidden " data-modal-dialog-overlay>
  <modal-dialog data-action="close:qbsearch-input#handleClose cancel:qbsearch-input#handleClose" data-target="qbsearch-input.searchSuggestionsDialog" role="dialog" id="search-suggestions-dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="search-suggestions-dialog-header" data-view-component="true" class="Overlay Overlay--width-large Overlay--height-auto">
      <h1 id="search-suggestions-dialog-header" class="sr-only">Search code, repositories, users, issues, pull requests...</h1>
    <div class="Overlay-body Overlay-body--paddingNone">
      
          <div data-view-component="true">        <div class="search-suggestions position-fixed width-full color-shadow-large border color-fg-default color-bg-default overflow-hidden d-flex flex-column query-builder-container"
          style="border-radius: 12px;"
          data-target="qbsearch-input.queryBuilderContainer"
          hidden
        >
          <!-- '"` --><!-- </textarea></xmp> --></option></form><form id="query-builder-test-form" action="" accept-charset="UTF-8" method="get">
  <query-builder data-target="qbsearch-input.queryBuilder" id="query-builder-query-builder-test" data-filter-key=":" data-view-component="true" class="QueryBuilder search-query-builder">
    <div class="FormControl FormControl--fullWidth">
      <label id="query-builder-test-label" for="query-builder-test" class="FormControl-label sr-only">
        Search
      </label>
      <div
        class="QueryBuilder-StyledInput width-fit "
        data-target="query-builder.styledInput"
      >

      <h1 class="Overlay-title " id="custom-scopes-dialog-title">

      </h1>
        <h2 id="custom-scopes-dialog-description" class="Overlay-description">Use saved searches to filter your results more quickly</h2>

      <button data-close-dialog-id="custom-scopes-dialog" aria-label="Close" aria-label="Close" type="button" data-view-component="true" class="close-button Overlay-closeButton"><svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg></button>
    </div>
  </div>
  
</div>
      <scrollable-region data-labelled-by="custom-scopes-dialog-title">
        <div data-view-component="true" class="Overlay-body">        <div data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesModalDialogFlash"></div>

        <div hidden class="create-custom-scope-form" data-target="custom-scopes.createCustomScopeForm">
        <!-- '"` --><!-- </textarea></xmp> --></option></form><form id="custom-scopes-dialog-form" data-turbo="false" action="/search/custom_scopes" accept-charset="UTF-8" method="post"><input type="hidden" data-csrf="true" name="authenticity_token" value="82ZCKYHYjuXdrDCFWLXhLBfDLwN5mvfFk+ZbP6B3ru6lmMLv6uFZwMZFH97Gmo4Tsz0YvliCINAvEJicdtkZyA==" />
          <div data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesModalDialogFlash"></div>

          <input type="hidden" id="custom_scope_id" name="custom_scope_id" data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesIdField">

          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="custom_scope_name">Name</label>
            <auto-check src="/search/custom_scopes/check_name" required>
              <input
                type="text"
                name="custom_scope_name"
                id="custom_scope_name"
                data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesNameField"
                class="form-control"
                autocomplete="off"
                placeholder="github-ruby"
                required
                maxlength="50">
              <input type="hidden" data-csrf="true" value="W06h6t/8bkNES9XRkiga53tHpH9hxzLk+JLVDnw6ONvP+DGPEfsDdNCBXf8KyXv3591BeYY3pJmmi/3zmBArlg==" />
            </auto-check>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="custom_scope_query">Query</label>
            <input
              type="text"
              name="custom_scope_query"
              id="custom_scope_query"
              data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesQueryField"
              class="form-control"
              autocomplete="off"
              placeholder="(repo:mona/a OR repo:mona/b) AND lang:python"
              required
              maxlength="500">
          </div>

          <p class="text-small color-fg-muted">
            To see all available qualifiers, see our <a class="Link--inTextBlock" href="https://docs.github.com/search-github/github-code-search/understanding-github-code-search-syntax">documentation</a>.
          </p>
</form>        </div>

        <div data-target="custom-scopes.manageCustomScopesForm">
          <div data-target="custom-scopes.list"></div>
        </div>

</div>
      </scrollable-region>
      <div data-view-component="true" class="Overlay-footer Overlay-footer--alignEnd Overlay-footer--divided">          <button data-action="click:custom-scopes#customScopesCancel" type="button" data-view-component="true" class="btn">    Cancel
</button>
          <button form="custom-scopes-dialog-form" data-action="click:custom-scopes#customScopesSubmit" data-target="custom-scopes.customScopesSubmitButton" type="submit" data-view-component="true" class="btn-primary btn">    Create saved search
</button>
</div>
</dialog></dialog-helper>

</div>

code reviews","","* refactor(load): rewrite resolve logic","","* fix(config-nx-scopes): fix syntax error","","* feat(resolve-extends): add resolveFrom and loadParserPreset","","* feat(load): use resolveFrom and loadParserPreset from resolve-extends","","* test: include only @commitlint/* packages src in coverage","","* test: explicit import vitest utilities","","* test: remove @jest/globals from dependencies","","* fix(resolve-extends): `resolveFrom` output should be platform aware","","* test: restore NO_COLOR to test script","","* chore: fix linting issues","","* fix: should use fileURLToPath instead of pathname for Windows compatibility","","* Apply suggestions from code review","","* fix: should reuse `cli` instead call `yargs()`","","* feat(cli): set terminalWidth as wrap <ul dir="auto">
<li>support command line options from a file (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/4109" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/4109/hovercard">#4109</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/a20e890f6b6c8bacdc511d40cb41f29415bdd044">a20e890</a>)</li>
<li>support linting from the last tag (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/4110" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/4110/hovercard">#4110</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/4b204ecfb43dd6a00e24b51111aadbd78f9d58e1">4b204ec</a>)</li>
</ul>

</ul>

<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">migrate to pure ESM</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">feat: migrate to pure ESM</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">chore: update snapshot</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">fix: load <code>parserPreset</code> with another <code>await</code></p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">test: migrate to vitest</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">test: remove no replacement <code>--runInBand</code> test-ci script</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">chore: fix code reviews</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">refactor(load): rewrite resolve logic</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">fix(config-nx-scopes): fix syntax error</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">feat(resolve-extends): add resolveFrom and loadParserPreset</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">feat(load): use resolveFrom and loadParserPreset from resolve-extends</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">test: include only @commitlint/* packages src in coverage</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">test: explicit import vitest utilities</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">test: remove @jest/globals from dependencies</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">fix(resolve-extends): <code>resolveFrom</code> output should be platform aware</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">test: restore NO_COLOR to test script</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">chore: fix linting issues</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">fix: should use fileURLToPath instead of pathname for Windows compatibility</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Apply suggestions from code review</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">fix: should reuse <code>cli</code> instead call <code>yargs()</code></p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">feat(cli): set terminalWidth as wrap to avoid work break on help</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Update .eslintrc.cjs</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">feat: migrate @commitlint/config-conventional to pure ESM</p>

<ul dir="auto">
<li>chore!: minimum node version v18 (#3644) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/5b4aeaf4f01c2726a7bc8631a23bb34c849baad2">5b4aeaf</a>), closes <a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/3644" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/3644/hovercard">#3644</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">BREAKING CHANGES</h3><a id="user-content-breaking-changes-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: BREAKING CHANGES" href="#breaking-changes-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">drop node v14 and v16 support</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">chore: remove unused types</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">docs: prepare node update and new release</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">chore!: minimum TS version v5</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">drop TS v4 support</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">ci: remove node v14/16 checks</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">chore: adjust node types to minimal supported version</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">chore!: further major versions of other deps</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">upgrade conventional-changelog-conventionalcommits, conventional-commits-parser, conventional-changelog-atom,</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">docs: simplify releases and remove roadmap</p>
</li>
</ul>

<li>

</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">update dependency fs-extra to v9 (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/1018" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/1018/hovercard">#1018</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/2df49fac907993ae78199a1012e918b0e2ff5621">2df49fa</a>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">update dependency get-stdin to v8 (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/1938" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/1938/hovercard">#1938</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/f94a5c82861523aa1cf407ffe062f99ecbbfb4e4">f94a5c8</a>)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">refactor!: drop support for node 8 (#1999) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/751f39f284ef232574a176c3c11b1982ee544166">751f39f</a>), closes <a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/1999" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/1999/hovercard">#1999</a></p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">BREAKING CHANGES</h3><a id="user-content-breaking-changes-4" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: BREAKING CHANGES" href="#breaking-changes-4"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>remove node 8 from circle-ci checks</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">also remove node 13 because we do not support experimental versions</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>docs: update node v10 to latest LTS 10 version</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bug Fixes</h3><a id="user-content-bug-fixes-19" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bug Fixes" href="#bug-fixes-19"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>add fallback with husky git params to deprecation handling (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/498" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/498/hovercard">#498</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/5a34b8c">5a34b8c</a>)</li>
<li>avoid truncated output on macOS (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/503" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/503/hovercard">#503</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/3192368">3192368</a>)</li>
<li>respect String.protoype.repeat API contract (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/f27e7ac">f27e7ac</a>)</li>
<li>update to security-patched dependency versions (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/97c033b">97c033b</a>)</li>
<li>use correct label for failing empty subjects (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/481" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/481/hovercard">#481</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/2e7e34d">2e7e34d</a>), closes <a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/476" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/476/hovercard">#476</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Features</h3><a id="user-content-features-12" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Features" href="#features-12"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>check stage before entering prompt (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/495" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/495/hovercard">#495</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/3b3667a">3b3667a</a>), closes <a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/51" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/51/hovercard">#51</a> <a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/51" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/51/hovercard">#51</a></li>
<li>warn on empty config (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/491" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/pull/491/hovercard">#491</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/commit/b6bd36e">b6bd36e</a>), closes <a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/107" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/107/hovercard">#107</a> <a href="https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/107" data-hovercard-type="issue" data-hovercard-url="/conventional-changelog/commitlint/issues/107/hovercard">#107</a></li>
</ul>
